svg.title: Alonzo Williams. Career as a System.
svg.desc: A Donella Meadows style stock and flow diagram of Zo Williams' software engineering career. Source clouds feed Deliberate Study, New Domain Exposure, and an AI Leveraged Learning tap into four accumulating stocks (Technical Capability, Problem Solving Toolkit, Network and Reputation, Leadership Influence), with Personal Energy as a finite stock. Loops named R1 Success to the Successful, R2 AI Leverage Compound, B1 Energy Limit, and B2 Limits to Growth (relaxed by R2).
svg.text: Alonzo Williams. Career as a System.
A Meadows style map. Stocks accumulate over fourteen years. The AI leverage tap is the recent loop that relaxes the personal capacity ceiling.
Boeing rotation, Manor TDD, SWC estimation
Manor seniors, SWC mentors, Lendr CTO transitions
who calls when something is hard

g.text: R1 Success to the Successful. Reputation begets harder problems, which build capability, which builds reputation.
R2 AI Leverage Compound. AI freed time funds more pattern investment, widening the AI tap further.
B1 Energy Limit. Influence pulls workload; energy depletion throttles effective capacity.
B2 Limits to Growth. Without leverage, problem complexity outpaces capacity. R2 is the loop that relaxes this ceiling.

svg.text: Figure: the recent era widens the AI tap (R2), which relaxes the personal capacity ceiling (B2), letting R1 keep compounding without saturating B1.
